backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for a wedding invitation platform, with data types and CRUD operations for invitations, events, RSVPs, photos, and background music stored in in-memory maps.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping feature IDs and titles to their implementing frontend files, component dependencies, and test IDs for the wedding invitation SaaS platform.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, covering pages, wizard steps, guest-view components, and utility components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for landing, create wizard, dashboard, invitation editor, and guest invitation pages, plus a global toast provider.
frontend/src/components/events/EventCard: Animated event card component displaying event type icon, title, formatted date/time/venue, and description, with edit and delete action buttons styled per event-type gradient config.
frontend/src/components/events/EventForm: A form component for creating or editing a wedding event, with fields for event type, title, date, time, venue, and description, using controlled state and calling onSave/onCancel callbacks.
frontend/src/components/guest/CountdownT: Displays a live countdown timer (days, hours, minutes, seconds) to the wedding date/time, styled according to the invitation's selected template.
frontend/src/components/guest/CoupleIntr: Renders a guest-facing section showing the invitation message and family details, with scroll-triggered fade-in animation and template-based styling.
frontend/src/components/guest/EventTimel: Renders a sorted list of wedding event cards (with date, time, venue, and description) for the guest view, each with scroll-triggered animations and event-type-specific styling.
frontend/src/components/guest/HeroSectio: Full-screen hero section for the guest invitation page, displaying the couple's names, wedding date, venue, optional couple photo, and a parallax background with template-driven colors.
frontend/src/components/guest/PhotoGalle: Displays a responsive photo grid for the guest invitation with a fullscreen lightbox supporting previous/next navigation, scroll animations, and template-based styling.
frontend/src/components/guest/RSVPForm.t: A guest-facing RSVP form component that collects name, phone, attendance, guest count, and message, then submits the response via a mutation hook and shows a confirmation screen on success.
frontend/src/components/guest/VenueSecti: Displays the wedding venue name, address, and an optional Google Maps link button, styled according to the invitation's selected template.
frontend/src/components/guest/WhatsAppSh: A fixed floating button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp share link for the wedding invitation URL using the couple's names.
frontend/src/components/layout/Decorativ: Renders one of three decorative divider variants (mandala image, line, or flourish image) with SVG/inline fallbacks if images fail to load.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: A fixed site header with scroll-aware background, logo, desktop navigation links, and a collapsible mobile menu for navigating to Home, Dashboard, and Create Invitation.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicContr: A fixed floating audio player with play/pause and mute/volume controls for looping background music on the guest invitation page.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicUploa: A form component for uploading background music (MP3/WAV/M4A) to an invitation, with preview playback, removal, and an auto-play toggle stored in the invitation form context.
frontend/src/components/media/PhotoGalle: A drag-and-drop photo gallery upload component that reads image files as base64 data URLs and stores them in the invitation form context, with a grid display and per-photo delete functionality.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonLoader.t: Reusable skeleton loading component supporting four variants (card, text, image, invitation-card) with configurable item count using Shadcn Skeleton primitives.
frontend/src/components/templates/ColorS: A grid-based color scheme selector that displays swatches from predefined COLOR_SCHEMES and highlights the currently selected scheme with a gold checkmark.
frontend/src/components/templates/FontSe: A font pairing selector that renders each option with its actual heading font as a sample preview, marking the selected choice with a gold checkmark badge.
frontend/src/components/templates/Templa: A scaled invitation preview card (9:16 aspect ratio) that renders couple photo, names, date, venue, and events using the selected template's colors and fonts.
A template browser that groups available templates by category (Royal Indian, Modern Minimal, Cinematic Dark) and renders each as a styled card with a simulated invitation preview.
frontend/src/components/wizard/CoupleDet: A wizard step for entering bride/groom names, love story, and uploading a couple photo via drag-and-drop or file input, storing all data in the invitation form context.
frontend/src/components/wizard/EventMana: A wizard step for managing wedding events (add, edit, delete) with an inline EventForm and a date-sorted grid of EventCards.
frontend/src/components/wizard/MediaMana: A wizard step that composes the PhotoGalleryUpload and MusicUploader components inside styled luxury cards for managing invitation media.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ProgressB: Renders a multi-step wizard progress bar with numbered circles, a gold gradient active line, and checkmarks for completed steps, displaying step labels on larger screens.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ReviewSte: Displays a review/publish step where users can set a unique URL slug and see a summary of couple details, events, template, and media selections before publishing.
frontend/src/components/wizard/TemplateT: Wizard step for selecting and customizing the invitation template, color scheme, font, and background style, with a live preview panel on the right.
frontend/src/context/InvitationFormConte: Defines the InvitationFormContext with a FormData interface covering all wizard steps (couple details, events, template, media), providing state and update functions via a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend CRUD operations on invitations, events, RSVPs, photos, and music, wrapping actor calls with proper cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Provides useScrollAnimation (triggers visibility state when an element enters the viewport) and useLazyLoad (loads an image's data-src on intersection) hooks using IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond, Inter, Playfair Display), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a luxury wedding color palette with CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, including gold, ivory, blush, and crimson tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/CreateInvitationWizar: Multi-step wizard page for creating a new wedding invitation, handling form validation per step and sequentially calling backend mutations to create the invitation, add events, upload photos, and set background music upon submission.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page that lists all user invitations as cards with options to edit, view, publish, or delete each invitation, using query hooks for data fetching and mutations.
frontend/src/pages/GuestInvitation.tsx: Public-facing guest invitation page that fetches invitation data, events, photos, and music by slug, then renders themed sections (hero, countdown, couple intro, event timeline, gallery, venue, RSVP) using the selected template's styling.
frontend/src/pages/InvitationEditor.tsx: Invitation editor page for an existing invitation identified by slug, providing tabbed editing of couple details, events, template, and media, along with save and publish actions and a publish-confirmation modal with copy/WhatsApp share options.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page showcasing the Vivah platform with a parallax hero section, feature grid, and sample invitation previews using luxury Indian wedding aesthetics.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: 404 error page with a decorative heart icon, styled messaging, and navigation buttons linking back to the home page and dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/animations.ts: Defines reusable animation constants (durations, easings) and Framer Motion-style animation presets (fadeIn, slideUp, scaleIn) plus helper functions for stagger delays.
frontend/src/utils/eventIcons.tsx: Maps each Indian wedding EventType (Haldi, Mehndi, Sangeet, etc.) to a configuration object containing label, Lucide icon, colors, and CSS classes.
frontend/src/utils/templateDefinitions.t: Defines six wedding invitation template configurations (Royal Indian, Modern Minimal, Cinematic Dark) with color schemes, fonts, and preview gradients, plus exported color scheme and font pairing arrays.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with a luxury wedding color palette (gold, crimson, ivory, blush), custom serif font families, shadow utilities, and plugin imports for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the AI-powered Indian Wedding Invitation SaaS platform's architecture, existing features, known issues, and required image assets at version 3.
